label: timeline alignment
text: Can you tell me if the timeline still works? We need to know soon because the team is planning around it, and I do not want to guess.

label: workflow question
text: I am trying to understand whether this content should go through the same pipeline as the public articles or if there is a different path for internal-only items.

label: meeting follow-up
text: Thanks for meeting today. I think we got most of the way there, but I still need clarity on who owns the handoff and what the first delivery actually includes.
